text: 6 Minute English, from bbclearningenglish .com
zh: [0] 6分钟英语,来自bbclearningenglish.com

text: Hello. This is 6 Minute English from BBC Learning English.
zh: [1] 大家好,欢迎收听BBC英语教学的6分钟英语节目。

text: I'm Neil. And I'm Pippa. Many of us don't think twice about where the food in our kitchen comes from.
zh: [2] 我是Neil。我是Pippa。我们很多人从不多想厨房里的食物是从哪里来的。

text: One trip to the supermarket and we can buy anything we want, whether that's fruit grown in South America,
zh: [3] 只要去一趟超市,我们就能买到想要的任何东西,无论是南美种植的水果,

text: tomatoes from Spain, or rice flown in from Asia. Do you know where Where the food you buy comes from,
zh: [4] 西班牙产的西红柿,还是从亚洲空运来的大米。你知道你买的食物是从哪里来的吗,

text: Neil? I try to pay attention and buy stuff that's locally produced, but actually sometimes I don't really look.
zh: [5] Neil?我会尽量留意,买本地产的东西,但其实有时候我并不会真正去看。

text: How about you? I actually have a calendar on my kitchen wall which
zh: [6] 你呢?我厨房墙上其实挂着一张日历,

text: tells me which fruits and vegetables are grown at what times of year.
zh: [7] 上面标明了各种水果蔬菜分别在什么时节种植。

text: The reality is that the supply of fresh food to the UK is fragile.
zh: [8] 现实是,英国的新鲜食品供应是很脆弱的。

text: The UK imports around 40 % of its food
zh: [9] 英国大约40%的食品依赖进口,

text: and this supply chain can easily be disrupted by wars, shortages and increasingly by climate change.
zh: [10] 而这条供应链很容易因战争、短缺,以及日益严重的气候变化而中断。

text: In fact, the UK Government's Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs
zh: [11] 事实上,英国政府的环境、食品与农村事务部

text: recently reported on the importance of food security
zh: [12] 最近发布报告,强调了粮食安全的重要性——

text: – the term for having a reliable enough supply of affordable, healthy food to feed everyone.
zh: [13] 这个词指的是要有足够可靠的、可负担的健康食品供应,来养活所有人。

text: In this episode, we'll be investigating the issues affecting food production in the the UK.
zh: [14] 在这一期节目中,我们将探讨影响英国粮食生产的各种问题。

text: As usual, we'll learn some useful new vocabulary
zh: [15] 一如既往,我们会学习一些实用的新词汇,

text: and remember there's a quiz, worksheet and transcript of this episode on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: [16] 别忘了我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上有本期的测验、练习题和文字稿。

text: But first, of course, Pippa, I have a quiz question for you.
zh: [17] 但首先,Pippa,照例我有一个测验问题要问你。

text: I mentioned that Britain imports 40 % of its food from other producers, mostly in Europe.
zh: [18] 我提到,英国40%的食品依赖从其他生产国进口,主要来自欧洲。

text: But which European country does the UK import the most food from?
zh: [19] 但英国从哪个欧洲国家进口的食品最多呢?

text: Is it a. France, b. The Netherlands or c. Ireland?
zh: [20] 是a.法国,b.荷兰,还是c.爱尔兰?

text: I've seen the Netherlands on a lot of food packaging in the UK, so I'm going to say b the Netherlands.
zh: [21] 我在英国的很多食品包装上都见过荷兰的字样,所以我选b,荷兰。

text: OK, well, we'll find out if you're right later in the programme.
zh: [22] 好的,我们稍后在节目中揭晓答案,看你是否说对了。

text: According to the UK government's recent report, there are many issues affecting Britain's food supply.
zh: [23] 根据英国政府最近的报告,有许多问题正影响着英国的粮食供应。

text: Geopolitical conflicts like those in Ukraine and Iran,
zh: [24] 像乌克兰和伊朗这样的地缘政治冲突,

text: droughts and water shortages, loss of biodiversity caused by climate change. The list goes on and on.
zh: [25] 干旱和水资源短缺,气候变化导致的生物多样性丧失。这样的例子不胜枚举。

text: Here, climate reporter Mark Pointing discusses the report's conclusions with BBC Radio 4's The Food Programme.
zh: [26] 在这里,气候记者Mark Pointing与BBC第四广播电台的《食品节目》讨论了这份报告的结论。

text: And it really draws on scientific research to come up with what it calls as a reasonable worst case scenario
zh: [27] 报告确实借鉴了科学研究,提出了所谓“合理最坏情况”的设想,

text: for how biodiversity loss could affect UK security. And its conclusions are really quite stark.
zh: [28] 说明生物多样性的丧失可能如何影响英国的安全。而它的结论相当严峻。

text: The first line of the report says global ecosystem degradation and collapse threatens the UK's national security.
zh: [29] 报告的第一句话就说,全球生态系统的退化和崩溃威胁着英国的国家安全。

text: The report describes a worst -case scenario, where Britain runs out of food.
zh: [30] 报告描述了一种最坏情况,即英国的食物耗尽。

text: A worst -case scenario is the worst possible thing that could happen in a particular situation.
zh: [31] “最坏情况”指的是在某一特定情境下可能发生的最糟糕的事情。

text: Mark says the report's conclusions are stark – an adjective which in this case means obvious or severe.
zh: [32] Mark说这份报告的结论是stark——在这里这个形容词意思是明显的或严重的。

text: Another problem with food security relates to climate change.
zh: [33] 粮食安全的另一个问题与气候变化有关。

text: Carbon emissions from food food production make up around a third of all greenhouse gases,
zh: [34] 食品生产产生的碳排放约占全部温室气体的三分之一,

text: from the diesel used to drive tractors, to fertilisers, to cows and sheep producing methane.
zh: [35] 从驱动拖拉机的柴油,到化肥,再到牛羊产生的甲烷,无所不包。

text: Emma Pinchbeck is the chief executive of the UK's Climate Change Committee.
zh: [36] Emma Pinchbeck是英国气候变化委员会的首席执行官。

text: She spoke about this problem with BBC Radio 4's The Food Programme.
zh: [37] 她就这个问题与BBC第四广播电台的《食品节目》进行了讨论。

text: The biggest chunk of emissions from agriculture comes from simply having livestock on the land. That's the bit of the puzzle that we need to think about going forward.
zh: [38] 农业排放中最大的一部分,仅仅是来自在土地上饲养牲畜。这正是我们今后需要认真思考的部分。

text: And in In the way that we've thought about it, for every cow or sheep we take off the land, we put on something else.
zh: [39] 而按照我们现在的思路,每从土地上减少一头牛或一只羊,我们就会用别的东西来替代。

text: And what that does overall is it makes farmers and landowners part of the solution to climate change, not the problem.
zh: [40] 总的来说,这样做能让农民和土地所有者成为应对气候变化的解决方案的一部分,而不是问题的一部分。

text: Livestock, that's farm animals such as cattle, sheep and pigs, contribute most of the carbon emissions from agriculture.
zh: [41] 牲畜,也就是牛、羊、猪等农场动物,是农业碳排放的主要来源。

text: Moving towards a sustainable food supply involves reducing the amount of meat and dairy we eat in favour
zh: [42] 迈向可持续的粮食供应,意味着要减少我们所吃的肉类和乳制品,转而选择

text: of non -animal protein such as beans and lentils.
zh: [43] 豆类和扁豆等非动物蛋白。

text: Encouraging farmers and consumers to move away from meat is a piece of the puzzle, according to Emma.
zh: [44] 据Emma所说,鼓励农民和消费者减少肉类消费是解决方案的一部分。

text: A piece of the puzzle means a part of the solution to a problem, in this case the twin problems of food security and climate change.
zh: [45] “拼图的一块”意思是解决某个问题的一部分方案,在这里指的是粮食安全和气候变化这一对问题。

text: Emma says it's important to think again about how farmland is used.
zh: [46] Emma说,重新思考农田的使用方式非常重要。

text: For every cow or sheep taken off the land, something else, such as a fruit tree or vegetable crop, is put in its place.
zh: [47] 每从土地上撤走一头牛或一只羊,就会用别的东西,比如果树或蔬菜作物,来取而代之。

text: That way farmers become part of the solution, not the problem.
zh: [48] 这样一来,农民就成为解决方案的一部分,而不是问题本身。

text: An idiom meaning that if you are not actively trying to fix a problem, you are helping it continue.
zh: [49] 这是一个习语,意思是如果你不去积极解决问题,你其实是在让问题延续下去。

text: Lots of ideas to chew over there, Neil. But now, isn't it time you revealed the answer to your question?
zh: [50] 有很多值得细细思考的想法呢,Neil。不过现在,是不是该揭晓你那个问题的答案了?

text: My question was, which European country does the UK import the most food from?
zh: [51] 我的问题是,英国从哪个欧洲国家进口的食品最多?

text: And you said b the Netherlands. And you were absolutely correct, Pippa.
zh: [52] 你说是b,荷兰。你完全答对了,Pippa。

text: It is the Netherlands. The The UK imports £7 .6 billion worth of imports, especially vegetables and dairy.
zh: [53] 就是荷兰。英国从荷兰进口的商品价值高达76亿英镑,尤其是蔬菜和乳制品。

text: OK, let's recap the vocabulary we've learned, starting with food security –
zh: [54] 好了,我们来回顾一下学到的词汇,首先是“粮食安全”——

text: the situation where a country has a reliable enough supply of food to feed its population.
zh: [55] 指一个国家拥有足够可靠的食品供应来养活其人口的状况。

text: The worst -case scenario is the worst possible thing that could happen in a particular situation.
zh: [56] “最坏情况”指在某一特定情境下可能发生的最糟糕的事情。

text: The adjective stark has several meanings, including obvious and severe.
zh: [57] 形容词stark有好几个含义,包括“明显的”和“严重的”。

text: Livestock are animals and birds that are kept on a farm, such as cows, sheep or chickens.
zh: [58] 牲畜指农场里饲养的动物和家禽,比如牛、羊或鸡。

text: The phrase a piece of the puzzle means a part of the solution to a problem.
zh: [59] 短语“拼图的一块”意思是解决某个问题的一部分方案。

text: And finally, the idiom be part of the solution, not the problem,
zh: [60] 最后,习语“成为解决方案的一部分,而不是问题”,

text: means that if you are not actively trying to fix a problem, you are helping it continue.
zh: [61] 意思是如果你不去积极解决问题,你其实是在让问题延续下去。

text: Once again, our six minutes are up, but if this topic has made you hungry for more,
zh: [62] 我们的六分钟又到时间了,不过如果这个话题让你意犹未尽,

text: Or why not check out our food topic page on our website bbclearningenglish .com. Bye for now. Goodbye.
zh: [63] 不妨去我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上的美食话题页面看看。再见啦。再见。
